g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the raw customer data look like in this project?')
sendPrompt('Explain the feature engineering step in the churn classifier project')
sendPrompt('What preprocessing is done before training the MLP model?')
sendPrompt('Explain the MLP neural network architecture used in this project')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics are used in the churn classifier project?')
sendPrompt('How does SHAP explainability work in the churn classifier?')
sendPrompt('How does the Flask API work in the churn classifier project?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit dashboard show in this project?')
sendPrompt('How is the churn classifier dockerized for deployment?')
sendPrompt('What is the business impact of the churn classifier?')
